stemHtml: During the pre-flight inspection, one of the two fire detection loops in an aircraft is found to be inoperative. Can the aircraft be safely dispatched?

options.a: No, as both loops are required to provide a fire alarm.
options.c: No, a single loop failure will mean that the other loop fails also.
options.d: Yes, the fire detection system is not required for dispatch so both loops can be inoperative.
